heroSubtitle: An integrated, optimized platform for Latin America: discover talent, plan campaigns, and run collaborations with cutting-edge technology — and artificial intelligence at the heart of the creative workflow.
brandBullet1: Discovery engine with country, ER%, and category filters
brandBullet3: Proposals with clear statuses for your sales team
brandBullet4: Unified panel — no jumping between disconnected tools
influencerBullet1: Professional profile visible to LATAM brands
influencerBullet2: Metrics and audience in one place
influencerBullet3: Receive and respond to proposals seamlessly
influencerBullet4: Grow with brands seeking regional authenticity
productSubtitle: Not just another tool: a unified stack, simpler to run, and built to scale with your regional operations.
howSubtitle: From search to reporting — the flow your partner can pitch in one meeting.
howStep1Desc: Find creators aligned with your brand and target audience.
howStep2Desc: Review KPIs, engagement, and audience data before you invest.
howStep3Desc: Set objective, budget, dates, and format per network.
howStep4Desc: Send proposals and manage responses in real time.
howStep5Desc: Track results; advanced reporting on the roadmap.
finalCtaTitle: The future of influencer campaigns starts here
finalCtaSubtitle: Join the POC, try the full flow today, and be among the first to unlock AI avatars and the campaign agent when they ship.
footerTagline: Connecting brands and influencers across Latin America.
previewDisclaimer: Product preview — illustration, not live data
networksLabel: Campaigns on the networks your clients already use
toolsTitle: Everything they expect from a leading platform
toolsSubtitle: Discovery, analysis, and campaigns in one product — plus an AI layer built to automate creative and operational work.
toolDiscoverDesc: Advanced search by country, followers, engagement, and creator category.
toolAnalyzerDesc: Full influencer profile: audience, KPIs, and content type.
toolCampaignDesc: Create per-network campaigns with goals, dates, and budget.
toolProposalsDesc: Send, accept, or reject collaborations with full traceability.
toolPanelDesc: my_panel-style view: active campaigns and quick actions.
toolReportsDesc: Consolidated metrics per campaign and social network.
toolAiAvatarDesc: Create a brand avatar that helps draft briefs, ad scripts, and campaign messaging.
toolAiAgentDesc: An assistant that guides brands through goals, budget, creator selection, and end-to-end logistics.
visionSubtitle: Run the marketplace end-to-end today. Tomorrow, AI accelerates every creative and operational decision.
visionPoint1: Custom AI avatars for briefs and ad copy
visionPoint2: Conversational agent to design and launch campaigns
visionPoint3: Campaign logistics as a service, with real-time recommendations
